task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Odoo Inventory as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web interface (Inventory app or dashboard) with the user logged in as admin.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Batch Transfers' feature is enabled in Odoo Inventory settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Odoo Inventory Configuration/Settings page show the 'Batch Transfers' checkbox checked and saved.

task_completion.description: Verify a single Batch Transfer is created containing the four target customers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Batch Transfer screen shows delivery orders specifically for 'Downtown Commercial HVAC', 'City Metro Transit Authority', 'Apex Construction', and 'Riverside Property Management' added to the transfer list.

task_completion.description: Verify the distractor customers are NOT included in the Batch Transfer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Batch Transfer list does NOT contain any orders for 'Toronto Industrial Corp' or 'London Underground Maintenance'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Batch Transfer is validated, marking the orders as shipped.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Batch Transfer screen shows a status badge of 'Done' or similar indication that the batch has been successfully validated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web browser interface, without terminal windows running scripts or API commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly the functional Odoo web application, not a text editor, static mockup, or manipulated HTML.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL queries or Python XML-RPC scripts used to artificially change order statuses.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target customers to include in the batch transfer: Downtown Commercial HVAC, City Metro Transit Authority, Apex Construction, Riverside Property Management. Distractor customers to strictly exclude: Toronto Industrial Corp, London Underground Maintenance. The pass threshold for scoring is 70/100.
